---
name: "🐛 Bug Report"
about: Report a reproducible bug or unexpected behaviour
labels: ["bug", "needs-triage"]
assignees: artcava
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to ‘...’
2. Run ‘...’
3. See error

## Expected Behaviour

What did you expect to happen?

## Actual Behaviour

What actually happened? Include any error messages or stack traces.

## Environment

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| OS | e.g. Windows 11 / Ubuntu 22.04 |
| .NET version | e.g. 8.0.x |
| Azure Functions Core Tools | e.g. v4.x |
| Branch / Commit SHA | e.g. `main` / `abc1234` |

## Logs / Screenshots

Paste relevant log output here (redact any secrets).

## Additional Context

Any other information that might help diagnose the issue.
